behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all asserted file paths, the SubagentFooter export name, navigation labels (Parent, Prev/Previous, Next), token properties (input/output/reasoning/cache.read/cache.write), Intl.NumberFormat/Locale, mouse handlers, and the Show/parentID wrapper.

no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction describes the broken behavior and required characteristics but leaves implementation choices (structure, signals, handlers) to the developer.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept alternatives (onMouseUp/onClick/onMouseDown/onPress, Intl.NumberFormat OR Locale, Prev OR Previous) rather than gold-specific identifiers.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run prettier, bun typecheck, bun test, and Node subprocess parses — not merely grep text.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual integration (SubagentFooter imported in index, token/cost access, navigation labels) that a stub cannot satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover footer creation, token/cost display, navigation, conditional rendering on parentID, dialog-model else removal, and dialog-variant unused import removal.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, Pass-to-pass, Fail-to-pass) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces UI/TSX code, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (subagent-footer.tsx, dialog-model.tsx, parentID) appear consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies files to investigate (required since the task is to create/fix specific files) but does not name line numbers or exact replacements.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task with no config edits.
